# Nordic Walking Tours Northern Ireland

> Guided Nordic walking tours along the stunning North Coast of Northern Ireland. Based in Coleraine, led by instructor Sasha.

## About

Nordic Walking Tours NI offers guided Nordic walking experiences along Northern Ireland's Causeway Coast. Combining proper Nordic walking technique with coastal discovery — hidden beaches, dramatic clifftops, and the Atlantic horizon. Suitable for all fitness levels, beginners welcome.

## Website

- URL: https://nordicwalk.fit
- Contact email: sashe4ka.petrova@gmail.com
- Phone / WhatsApp: +44 7541 772498
- Telegram: https://t.me/+447541772498
- Location: Coleraine, Northern Ireland

## Tour Locations

- **Portrush** — Rocky coastline with sweeping ocean panoramas and harbour views
- **Portstewart Strand** — Two miles of golden sand backed by dunes
- **Whiterocks Beach** — Dramatic white limestone cliffs and hidden coves
- **Benone Beach** — Vast peaceful sands with Mussenden Temple on the cliffs above

## Tours Offered

- **Coastal Walking Tour** — 1.5–2 hours, up to 8 people. Cliff paths and beaches with guided instruction and photo stops.
- **Beach Nordic Walking** — 1 hour, up to 10 people. Fitness-focused session on the sand at Portstewart or Benone.
- **Beginner Lesson** — 45 minutes, up to 6 people. Learn technique, posture, and pole usage in Portrush area.
- **Private Tour** — Flexible duration, your group, your chosen location. Tailored for families, friends, or corporate wellness.

## Key Benefits of Nordic Walking

- Full-body workout engaging 90% of muscles
- Burns 40% more calories than regular walking
- Gentle on joints — suitable for all ages
- Stress relief through rhythmic movement in nature
- Small groups for genuine connections
- Beginner-friendly — no experience needed

## Languages

English, Russian, Ukrainian

## Booking

Book via the website at https://nordicwalk.fit or contact directly via WhatsApp, Telegram, phone, or email. Response within 24 hours.
